headline: Coastguard Modernization Requires RM8.5 Billion Over Decade
context: MMEA submitted 10-year modernization plan requiring RM8.5 billion to upgrade aging fleet and surveillance systems.

cards.big: MMEA seeks RM8.5 billion for 10-year coastguard modernization
cards.sub: Agency operates 280 vessels but only 160 seaworthy for ocean patrols

cards.big: Plan includes 45 new patrol vessels and 8 surveillance aircraft
cards.sub: Current fleet average age of 18 years means 40% need replacement in 5 years

cards.big: MMEA covers 614,000 sq km with only 160 capable vessels
cards.sub: Equivalent to 1 patrol vessel per 3,800 square kilometres of ocean

cards.big: Government approved only RM1.2 billion of RM8.5 billion for first phase
cards.sub: Full modernization would not be achieved until 2040 at current funding

cards.big: Coastguard funding tests whether maritime security gets investment proportional to risk
RM8.5 billion coastguard modernization over a decade. Maritime security is a continuous investment, not a one-time purchase.
